product_overview: Cognivern is a frontend control plane for autonomous agent wallet operations, focused on governed spend management, policy evaluation, and audit-ready transaction visibility. It provides a dashboard experience for developers, operators, and compliance users to inspect agents, policies, runs, and integrations.
core_goals: Provide a public landing experience that explains Cognivern and demonstrates policy-driven spend evaluation
Deliver a dashboard for agent statistics, spend overview, and navigation across governance workflows
Support agent management, including list, detail, and workshop flows
Enable governance policy creation, version tracking, and action evaluation against rules
Expose audit trails, copilot workflow runs, and CRE run history with drill-down details
Offer integration management for API keys, webhooks, and workspace settings
Provide supporting UX capabilities such as theme switching, responsive layout, web3 wallet connection, and terminal access

features.name: Landing page
features.description: Public marketing and onboarding entry point that explains the product, shows a live spend demo, and demonstrates integration concepts.
user_flows: GET / with no authentication -> Receive landing page with hero, spend demo, architecture, and API examples sections -> View product explanation and integration guidance
GET / with demo data unavailable -> Receive landing page with fallback content and graceful error state -> Continue browsing hero and informational sections without console-blocking failure

features.name: Dashboard overview
features.description: Main authenticated workspace that summarizes agent statistics, spend activity, and governance signals.
user_flows: GET /dashboard with available demo data -> Receive dashboard with agent stats, spend overview, and recent activity -> Navigate via sidebar to agents, policies, audit, and settings pages
GET /dashboard when backend data is unavailable -> Receive dashboard with mock or fallback data -> See non-blocking error state for missing metrics while core navigation remains usable

features.name: Agent management
features.description: Pages for browsing registered agents, inspecting an individual agent, and creating or configuring agents in the workshop.
user_flows: GET /agents -> Receive list of registered agents -> Select an agent -> GET /agents/[agentId] -> Receive agent detail page with status and decision history
GET /agents/workshop -> Receive agent workshop interface -> Configure a new agent -> Submit configuration to backend workflow or demo state -> Receive confirmation or created-agent preview
GET /agents/[agentId] with invalid agentId or missing data -> Receive not-found or error state -> Return to /agents to choose a valid agent

features.name: Governance policies
features.description: Policy management and evaluation workflows for defining spend rules and checking actions against governance requirements.
user_flows: GET /policies -> Receive policy list with versions and change history -> Open a policy -> Review rule definitions and historical revisions
GET /governance/check -> Receive evaluation form -> Submit an action for policy review -> Receive approve or reject result with reasoning and policy references
POST /governance/check with invalid or incomplete action payload -> Receive validation error response -> Correct the form and resubmit for evaluation

features.name: Spend demo
features.description: Interactive scenario that simulates a spend request and shows the policy decision path in real time.
user_flows: GET /demo/spend -> Receive interactive spend demo with controls and visualization -> Adjust scenario parameters -> Trigger policy evaluation -> Receive approval or rejection outcome with explanation
GET /demo/spend when evaluation service is unavailable -> Receive demo UI with fallback/mock data -> Show graceful error messaging and preserve control interaction

features.name: Audit trail
features.description: Compliance-focused view of audit logs, including evidence hashes and transaction status.
user_flows: GET /audit -> Receive audit trail with evidence hashes and compliance status -> Open a record -> Inspect transaction details and linked evidence
GET /audit with unavailable audit data -> Receive audit page with empty or fallback state -> Display compliance-unavailable messaging without breaking navigation

features.name: Copilot runs
features.description: Execution history for AI workflow runs with a detailed event timeline for each run.
user_flows: GET /copilot -> Receive list of copilot workflow runs -> Select a run -> GET /runs/[runId] -> Receive run detail page with event timeline
GET /runs/[runId] with invalid runId -> Receive error or not-found state -> Return to /copilot or /runs to inspect valid executions

features.name: CRE run history
features.description: Historical view of CRE workflow executions and drill-down into individual run details.
user_flows: GET /runs -> Receive CRE run history list -> Select a run -> GET /runs/[runId] -> Receive execution details and timeline
GET /runs/[runId] when the run cannot be found -> Receive not-found or error state -> Navigate back to /runs to continue browsing

features.name: PromptOS terminal
features.description: Terminal-style interface for interacting with PromptOS in the dashboard context.
user_flows: GET /os -> Receive xterm-based terminal interface -> Enter a command -> Receive terminal output and interactive prompt behavior
GET /os when terminal initialization fails -> Receive error state or degraded terminal fallback -> Preserve page layout and provide recovery guidance

features.name: Settings and integrations
features.description: Workspace configuration area for API keys, webhooks, and general integration settings.
user_flows: GET /settings -> Receive workspace settings page -> Update configuration fields -> Save changes -> Receive confirmation state
GET /integrate -> Receive API key and webhook management interface -> Create or edit an API key/webhook -> Submit changes -> Receive success confirmation and refreshed configuration
POST /integrate or settings save with invalid credentials or malformed webhook URL -> Receive validation error -> Correct the input and resubmit successfully

features.name: Web3 wallet connection
features.description: Wallet connection experience supporting blockchain-based operations through RainbowKit and Wagmi.
user_flows: Open a page that requires wallet context -> Trigger RainbowKit connect flow -> Approve wallet connection -> Receive connected wallet state for subsequent web3 actions
Attempt wallet connection with rejected signature or unsupported wallet -> Receive connection error -> Retry or use a supported wallet provider

features.name: Theme and navigation UX
features.description: Global UI capabilities including dark/light mode and responsive sidebar navigation across the app.
user_flows: Toggle theme control on any supported page -> Update next-themes state -> Receive dark or light visual mode across the interface
Open dashboard on smaller viewport -> Sidebar collapses or adapts responsively -> Select a navigation item -> Receive the target dashboard page with preserved layout
Navigate to a route with missing data while using responsive layout -> Receive graceful loading or error UI -> Continue navigating without breaking the app shell

entry_points.description: Landing page with hero, spend demo, network architecture, and API examples
Main dashboard with agent stats, spend overview, and recent activity
Agent list page showing all registered agents
Individual agent detail page with status and decisions
Agent workshop for creating and configuring agents
Audit trail page with evidence hashes and compliance status
Copilot runs page showing AI workflow executions
Interactive spend demo with policy evaluation visualization
Governance check page for evaluating actions against policies
Integration page with API keys and webhook configuration
Policy management page for creating and viewing governance policies
CRE runs list page showing workflow execution history
Individual run detail page with event timeline

features: Landing page with animated hero section and live spend demo
Dashboard with agent statistics and spend governance overview
Copilot workflow runs with event timelines
Interactive spend flow demo with policy visualization

authentication.notes: Landing page and onboarding are public. Dashboard pages use demo data without requiring login.

api_endpoints.notes: Frontend calls backend API at this base URL. Demo mode uses mock data when API is unavailable.
